citations.content: Row for question 2 in the table: 'In the past 5 years have you ever used needles to take drugs, steroids, or anything not prescribed by your doctor?' — the No column shows a checkbox mark (ㅁ은 No) indicating No is selected

parentBlock.content:
1.Do you currently take any prescribed medications and/or dietary supplements? Please list all: Honase i PrenatalYesNo ☐
2.In the past 5 years have you ever used needles to take drugs, steroids, or anything not prescribed by your doctor? If YES when/what drug(s): Last time used:Yesㅁ은 No 白皮 것
3.Have you ever been exposed to toxic substances, pesticides, chemicals, or heavy metals? If YES when/what type:Yes ㅁ2 No A
4.Do you currently have any active major or blood stream bacterial, fungal, or viral infection? If YES, explain.Yes ☐2 No
5.Have you ever had minor infections? i.e. thrush, fungus-type infections? If YES when: Describe symptoms and reasons:Yes ☐2 No
6.In the last 120 days, have you been diagnosed with an active brain infection (encephalitis) or meningitis (viral or unknown cause)? If YES when: Describe symptoms and reasons:Yes [ ]2 ☑ 1
7.In the past 5 years, have you been bitten by an animal suspected of having rabies? If YES when/what animal:Yes ☐2 No 1
8.Been diagnosed during this pregnancy with, or had close contact with someone with SARS, HIV, or Hepatitis? If YES when: What kind of contact:Yes2 No ☐☑ 1
9.Have you ever had hepatitis (Hep A, B, C, D, or unspecified Hepatitis)? If YES when: What type:Yes ㅁ2 No ☑☑

citations.content: Row for question 53: 'In the past 5 years, have you had sexual contact with a male who has ever had sexual contact with another male?' — Yes column shows empty checkbox (☐), No column shows '2 No A' indicating No is selected

parentBlock.content:
45.Have you ever been diagnosed with a genetic disorder? If YES when/which one:Yes ༔བ༔བ༔No z
46.Do you have liver disease? If YES what type:No z ☑ zo
47.Have you ever had any surgeries in your life? If transplants, see # 59-61. If YES when: What surgeries?No ZQ
48.During this pregnancy, have you had a smallpox vaccine or any other vaccine? Please list all and when:༔བ༔བ YesNo
49.During this pregnancy, have you had contact with someone who has received the smallpox vaccine? If YES when: What kind of contact:Yes བ02 No
50.In the past 5 years, have you received any vaccinations (such as COVID)? If YES when: Covid Which ones: 2021Yes270 No
51.In the past 5 years, have you had sexual contact with anyone who was suspected of having HIV/AIDS, Hep B/C, or has had a positive test for HIV/AIDS, Hep B/C? If YES which one and when:Yes ㅁ2 No
52.In the past 5 years, have you had sex with anyone who injected drugs, steroids, or anything not prescribed by a doctor? If YES when and what drug(s):Yes བ༔ ☐2 No ☑
53.In the past 5 years, have you had sexual contact with a male who has ever had sexual contact with another male? If YES when:Yes ☐2 No A
54.In the past 5 years, have you had sexual contact with anyone who has ever had sex in exchange for money or drugs? If YES when:Yes ㅁ2 No ☑
55.In the past 5 years, have you had sexual contact with or lived with a person who has had hepatitis? If YES when:Yes ㅁ2 No 14
56.In the past 5 years, have you been in juvenile detention, lockup, jail, or prison for 72 or more consecutive hours? If YES when:Yes ㅁNo ✗
57.In the past 5 years, have you had sex with anyone who had been in juvenile detention, lockup, jail, or prison for 72 or more consecutive hours? If YES when were they in prison: Partners gender:Yes བ༔ ☐No ×
58.In the past 5 years, have you ever received money, drugs, or other payment for sex? If YES when:Yes ☐2 No ×
